clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth refers to residents aged 19 to 39.

clauses.title: Required Documents for Survey
clauses.text: The city may request survey documents, department submission files, and policy participation reports for the youth plan.

clauses.title: Plan Publication Deadline
clauses.text: The annual youth plan is published by April 30.

clauses.title: Support Amount Standard
clauses.text: Support amount standards for youth projects reflect the implementation plan and performance review.
